name: Unarmed Strike
definition: A melee attack using your body instead of a weapon
full_text: Instead of using a weapon to make a melee attack, you can use a punch, kick, headbutt, or similar forceful blow. In game terms, this is an Unarmed Strike—a melee attack that involves you using your body to damage, grapple, or shove a target within 5 feet of you.

options: Damage: Attack roll vs target; bonus = STR modifier + Proficiency Bonus; hit = 1d0 Bludgeoning + STR modifier
Grapple: Target makes STR or DEX save (DC 8 + STR + PB); fail = Grappled condition; target no more than 1 size larger; hand free
Shove: Target makes STR or DEX save (DC 8 + STR + PB); fail = push 5 feet or Prone condition; target no more than 1 size larger
